scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix creative-impression/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix creative-impression/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix creative-impression/frontend && npm run build --prefix creative-impression/backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix creative-impression/frontend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix creative-impression/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix creative-impression/frontend && npm run lint --prefix creative-impression/backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix creative-impression/frontend && npm run type-check --prefix creative-impression/backend
